title: selago angustibractea
intro: Selago angustibractea, also known as blue fang or blue tongue, is a type of succulent plant native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the Selago angustibractea plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
